parameters.content:
## Main Flow

Webhook and Schedule/RSS both normalize into one shared pipeline.

The processing order is: dedupe -> download -> transcription -> AI post generation -> draft save -> Telegram -> publish status update.

The workflow is intentionally portable: OpenAI and Telegram use env vars, while DB operations and yt-dlp are handled through mounted helper scripts inside the n8n container.

## Retries and Reliability

Whisper and OpenAI generation use explicit retry branches with waits of 5s, 15s, and 30s.

Telegram delivery retries once after 5s.

Every failure is normalized, logged to `error_logs`, sent to Telegram as an alert, and triggers temp-file cleanup in `/tmp/news-autoposter`.

## Bonus Tasks

Deduplication happens before any expensive work and returns `409` for webhook requests.

The `Schedule Trigger` + `RSS Read` path polls the configured RSS feed and reuses the same processing pipeline as the webhook path.

Background RSS executions do not emit webhook responses, they simply finish after success, duplicate skip, or error handling.
